name: Shell Footer
description: Bottom navigation bar with tabs (VP/PPM/Maconomy themes)

usageGuidance.when: Building application shell for VP, PPM, or Maconomy themes; use as primary bottom navigation with tab strip
antiPatterns: Don't use ShellFooter with CP theme - use FloatingNav instead
Don't use multiple ShellFooter instances in the same layout

notes.tabs: Pass tabs array with id, label, href, icon for each tab
notes.variant: Use 'compact' for reduced height; 'default' for full tab strip

examples.name: Default footer
examples.description: Footer with tab strip and add-tab button
